name: Five-System Verification Reactor
description: Complete five seeded physical control trials while preserving one shared stability resource.
natural_language: Complete all five mixed-input reactor trials. Follow each terse round rule and preserve enough shared stability to certify the core.

metadata.notes: Five shuffled rounds exercise continuous keyboard/mouse state, held chords, inertial braking, moving interception, and constrained route dragging. Replay grading validates every round plus the shared stability tape.
